message.content:
### SQL executed
```sql
-- Filter the top 5 most viewed films but only for those released in 2006
SELECT f.film_id, f.title, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count
FROM film f
JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id
JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id
WHERE f.release_year = 2006
GROUP BY f.film_id, f.title
ORDER BY rental_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
```

### Result
- Columns: `3`
- Rows returned: `5`
- Execution time: `34 ms`

### Data preview
| film_id | title | rental_count |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 103 | Bucket Brotherhood | 34 |
| 738 | Rocketeer Mother | 33 |
| 382 | Grit Clockwork | 32 |
| 730 | Ridgemont Submarine | 32 |
| 331 | Forward Temple | 32 |

### Interpretation
- Time filter suggested by the question: 2006.

### Limitations
- Results are constrained for safety (read-only, row limits).
- If you want, I can refine filters, sorting, or top-N.
